title: Ubiquiti UTR, Travel Dual-Band Wi-Fi 5 router
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Travel Router is an ultra-compact dual-band Wi-Fi 5 travel router operating simultaneously in the 2.4GHz and 5 GHz bands, delivering a maximum total throughput of up to 1.17Gbps , equipped with (2) 1Gbit ports and an intuitive display. The router can share mobile data from a smartphone or turn public Wi-Fi into a private network . With the Teleport feature, you can easily create a secure VPN tunnel back to your UniFi network from anywhere (2) 1Gbit ports (1x LAN, 1x LAN/WAN) and dual-band Wi-Fi 5 Total throughput up to 1.17Gbps - 300Mbps on 2.4GHz (2x2) and 867Mbps on 5GHz (2x2) USB tethering - share mobile data from a smartphone via USB-C Teleport - WireGuard VPN connection to a UniFi gateway with no configuration needed Powered via a dedicated USB-C port The device is managed locally via a web interface, and the manufacturer also offers remote management through the UniFi Mobility Manager portal, which is, however, subject to a fee Device USB-C - USB-C cable
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band), Bluetooth WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 13 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 13 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 2 Connectors and Interfaces USB-C ports 2 LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps + (1) 10/100/1000Mbps LAN/WAN Gigabit LAN Yes USB Yes Other features LCD display, Bluetooth Power Power type USB-C Max. power consumption [W] 5 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 40 Weight [g] 89 Width [mm] 65 Height [mm] 96 Depth [mm] 13
